content:
## MiroThinker: Scaling Research Agent Performance

Optimize research agents through model selection, context engineering, and interactive feedback loops to improve task solving capability and reasoning quality across domains.

### Core Concept

Multi-dimensional agent scaling through architectural choices, prompt design, and interactive refinement

### Key Techniques

This skill focuses on implementing approaches from research in agent reasoning, model optimization, and system scaling.

### Implementation

For implementation details, refer to the source paper at https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.11793

### Practical Guidance

- **When to use**: When building research agents that need enhanced problem-solving and systematic exploration
- **Integration**: Use with other agent skills for comprehensive systems
- **Scaling**: Consider performance trade-offs when applying at scale

### Reference

Paper: MiroThinker: Pushing the Performance Boundaries of Open-Source Research Agents via Model, Context, and Interactive Scaling
arXiv: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.11793
